name: futmaster
description: Manager masculino com singleplayer offline e multiplayer por salas, carreiras, premiações, partida 2D e automação.

scripts.test: node tests/simulation-smoke.mjs && node tests/release-smoke.mjs && node tests/review-smoke.mjs && node tests/awards-smoke.mjs && node tests/offline-career-smoke.mjs && node tests/multiplayer-smoke.mjs && node tests/multiplayer-client-smoke.mjs && node tests/multiplayer-server-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: node --check www/storage-namespace.js && node --check www/core.js && node --check www/v04-compat.js && node --check www/match-engine.js && node --check www/systems.js && node --check www/rules.js && node --check www/app.js && node --check www/career-v04.js && node --check www/international-v04.js && node --check www/universe-v05.js && node --check www/match2d-v05.js && node --check www/stability-v06.js && node --check www/career-market-v07.js && node --check www/world-pyramid-v08.js && node --check www/football-depth-v09.js && node --check www/release-core-v10.js && node --check www/release-ui-v10.js && node --check www/social-local-v10.js && node --check www/management-v11.js && node --check www/calendar-v12.js && node --check www/media-v13.js && node --check www/review-fixes-v20.js && node --check www/match-v20.js && node --check www/awards-v21.js && node --check www/offline-careers-v30.js && node --check www/offline-start-v30.js && node --check www/multiplayer-v31.js && node --check multiplayer/protocol.mjs && node --check multiplayer/server.mjs && node --check www/sw.js && npm test
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:prepare && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
